name: opencoven-role-creation-process
description: Create, validate, and activate ROLE.md specs for familiars with low-lift agentic guidance, bundling identity, skills, tools, workflows, and permission declarations.

interface.shortDescription: Create, validate, and activate ROLE.md specs for familiars with low-lift agentic guidance, bundling identity, skills, tools, workflows, and permission declarations.
interface.longDescription: Read the familiar's SOUL.md and existing roles, decide whether a Role is warranted, draft it from the template with matching workflows, then validate and activate deliberately.
interface.defaultPrompt: Help me use OpenCoven Role Creation Process safely.
